case_title: JOHN MA VS. RONALD S. YOUNG. DDS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,350.00 FILED BY MA, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG. DDS, RONALD S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-10-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONET PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED FEB-07-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG. DDS, RONALD S.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S DAUGHTER NIKA MA CHEN INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CHINESE - CHINESE/ENGLISH ON HIS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY MA, JOHN YOUNG. DDS, RONALD S.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG. DDS, RONALD S. $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,380.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG. DDS, RONALD S.
